user.title: Tank Dimensions
user.description: Configure the physical dimensions of your buffer tank.

data_description.tank_volume: Total water volume of the buffer tank in liters.
data_description.tank_height: Total height of the buffer tank in millimeters.

sensors.title: Temperature Sensors
sensors.description: Add a temperature sensor to the buffer tank. Sensors added so far: {count}.

data_description.sensor_position: Height of the sensor measured from the bottom of the tank in millimeters.
data_description.add_another: Check this to add another sensor after this one.

optional.title: Optional Settings
optional.description: Configure optional sensors and insulation properties.

data_description.return_temp_entity: Sensor measuring the return water temperature. Used as reference for energy calculation.
data_description.ambient_temp_entity: Sensor measuring the ambient temperature around the tank.
data_description.insulation_r_value: Thermal resistance of the tank insulation in m²·K/W. Required together with ambient sensor to calculate heat loss.

error.min_two_sensors: At least two temperature sensors are required.
error.position_exceeds_height: Sensor position cannot exceed tank height.
